events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: pneumatic pressure test being conducted without an exclusion zone. This is a serious safety violation. ASME B31.3 §345 requires precautions for pneumatic testing including exclusion of personnel from the test area. Work is in-progress. Decision must be fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk critical. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions: non-compliant maybe. Percent complete maybe 50. Value 0. Confidence high. Actions: stop test, establish exclusion zone, evacuate personnel, barricade area, then resume. References ASME B31.3 §345.

  "findings": [
    "Pneumatic pressure test is in progress without an established exclusion zone, exposing personnel to stored-energy hazard.",
    "Sequence/safety control violated: exclusion zone and personnel evacuation must be established before applying pneumatic test pressure."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the pneumatic test immediately and safely relieve pressure.",
    "Evacuate nonessential personnel from the test area.",
    "Establish barricaded exclusion zone and verify personnel are clear before re-pressurizing.",
    "Confirm test procedure complies with ASME B31.3 §345 pneumatic test precautions before resuming."
  ],
  "rationale": "Pneumatic testing stores significant compressed-gas energy; ASME B31.3 §345 requires precautions including exclusion of personnel from the vicinity. Proceeding without an exclusion zone is a critical non-compliance and unsafe sequence violation, so work must stop until controls are in place.",
  "references": ["ASME B31.3 §345"]
}
